function.name: find_patient_basic_info
function.description: Retrieve lightweight patient basic info (age/sex/weight) for initial consultation | Enables Agent to gather foundational data before symptom questioning

patient_id.description: Unique patient identifier (MRN or registration number)

function.call_scenario: Invoke at consultation initiation before any symptom questioning to establish patient baseline demographics

function.name: get_medical_history_key
function.description: Retrieve targeted medical history (allergy/medication history) for etiology analysis | Enables Agent to identify contraindications and red flags before treatment

history_type.description: Type of medical history to retrieve

function.call_scenario: Invoke after patient identification and before any prescription or treatment recommendation

function.name: ask_symptom_details
function.description: Structured questioning for symptom specifics (location/severity/duration/triggers) | Enables Agent to conduct systematic symptom assessment

example.response: Chest pain is 7/10, worsens with exertion, relieved by rest

function.name: retrieve_medication_details
function.description: Retrieve core drug info (dosage/contraindications/administration route) | Enables Agent to verify medication safety before prescription

medication_name.description: Generic or brand name of medication

example.details: Initial dose 10mg daily, may increase to max 40mg daily

function.call_scenario: Invoke before prescribing medication or when patient asks about drug details

function.name: assess_risk_level
function.description: Evaluate symptom risk grade (low/medium/high) + emergency recommendations | Enables Agent to triage cases and determine urgency

vital_signs.description: Key vital signs if available (e.g., BP, HR, Temp)

example.symptoms: chest pain, shortness of breath, diaphoresis

function.call_scenario: Invoke after initial symptom assessment to determine case urgency and triage priority

function.name: prescribe_medication_safe
function.description: Safe medication prescription (pre-checked for allergies/interactions) | Enables Agent to generate prescription with safety validation
function.call_scenario: Invoke ONLY after confirming no allergies/interactions via get_medical_history_key and retrieve_medication_details
function.mock_execution:
def prescribe_medication_safe(patient_id: str, medication_name: str, dosage: str, duration: str, route: str) -> dict:
    import datetime
    prescription_id = f'RX{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d%H%M%S")}'
    allergy_meds = ['Penicillin', 'Sulfa']
    allergy_alert = medication_name in allergy_meds
    safety_check = 'contraindicated' if allergy_alert else 'passed'
    return {
        'prescription_id': prescription_id,
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'medication_name': medication_name,
        'dosage': dosage,
        'safety_check': safety_check + ' (no allergy match)' if not allergy_alert else ' (allergy detected)',
        'dosage_confirmation': f'{dosage} (adjusted for renal function)' if route == 'oral' else dosage,
        'allergy_alert': allergy_alert,
        'interaction_alert': False
    }

function.name: retrieve_clinical_guideline
function.description: Targeted retrieval of clinical guideline snippets (no full-text) | Enables Agent to access evidence-based recommendations

guideline_aspect.description: Specific aspect of guideline to retrieve

example.recommendation: Initiate ACE inhibitor or ARB for patients with diabetes and CKD; target BP <130/80 mmHg

function.call_scenario: Invoke when uncertain about diagnosis or treatment protocol, or to validate clinical decision

function.name: record_diagnosis_icd10
function.description: Record diagnosis with ICD-10 coding | Enables Agent to document clinical diagnosis with standardized coding
function.call_scenario: Invoke after clinical assessment to formally document diagnosis in medical record
function.mock_execution:
def record_diagnosis_icd10(patient_id: str, diagnosis_name: str, icd10_code: str, diagnosis_type: str) -> dict:
    import datetime
    diagnosis_map = {
        'I10': 'Essential (primary) hypertension',
        'I12.9': 'Hypertensive chronic kidney disease, unspecified',
        'I50.9': 'Heart failure, unspecified',
        'E11.9': 'Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications'
    }
    record_id = f'DX{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d%H%M%S")}'
    timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S')
    return {
        'record_id': record_id,
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'diagnosis_name': diagnosis_map.get(icd10_code, diagnosis_name),
        'icd10_code': icd10_code,
        'diagnosis_confirmation': diagnosis_map.get(icd10_code, diagnosis_name),
        'diagnosis_type': diagnosis_type,
        'recorded_timestamp': timestamp
    }

function.name: transfer_to_specialist
function.description: Initiate specialist referral (for cases beyond general practice) | Enables Agent to escalate complex cases to appropriate specialist

example.referral_reason: Uncontrolled hypertension with suspected secondary cause, requires echocardiogram and cardiac evaluation

function.call_scenario: Invoke when case complexity exceeds general practice scope or specialist input is required
function.mock_execution:
def transfer_to_specialist(patient_id: str, specialty: str, urgency: str, referral_reason: str) -> dict:
    import datetime
    referral_id = f'REF{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d%H%M%S")}'
    specialists = {
        'cardiology': 'Dr. Li (Cardiology)',
        'nephrology': 'Dr. Wang (Nephrology)',
        'gastroenterology': 'Dr. Zhang (Gastroenterology)'
    }
    urgency_wait = {
        'emergency': 'Same day',
        'urgent': '3-5 business days',
        'routine': '2-3 weeks'
    }
    from datetime import timedelta
    appointment_date = (datetime.datetime.now() + timedelta(days=7 if urgency == 'routine' else 3 if urgency == 'urgent' else 0)).strftime('%Y-%m-%dT09:00:00')
    return {
        'referral_id': referral_id,
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'specialty': specialty,
        'specialist': specialists.get(specialty, f'Specialist ({specialty})'),
        'urgency': urgency,
        'appointment_time': appointment_date,
        'estimated_wait': urgency_wait.get(urgency, '1-2 weeks'),
        'referral_status': 'pending_confirmation'
    }

function.name: generate_follow_up_plan
function.description: Generate personalized follow-up plan (timing/tests/medication reminders) | Enables Agent to structure post-consultation care continuity

required_tests.description: Tests or labs to complete before follow-up

example.red_flag_instructions: Return immediately if chest pain, severe headache, or BP >180/120

function.call_scenario: Invoke at consultation conclusion to structure post-visit care and ensure follow-through
function.mock_execution:
def generate_follow_up_plan(patient_id: str, diagnosis: str, follow_up_type: str, timeframe_days: int, include_meds: bool = True) -> dict:
    import datetime
    plan_id = f'FUP{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d%H%M%S")}'
    follow_up_date = (datetime.datetime.now() + datetime.timedelta(days=timeframe_days)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    diagnosis_tests = {
        'hypertension': ['Renal function', 'Urinary protein', 'Electrolytes'],
        'diabetes': ['HbA1c', 'Fasting glucose', 'Lipid profile'],
        'CKD': ['eGFR', 'Creatinine', 'Potassium', 'Urinalysis']
    }
    diagnosis_meds = {
        'hypertension': 'Take Amlodipine at 8 AM daily',
        'diabetes': 'Take Metformin with meals',
        'CKD': 'Take ACE inhibitor as prescribed, avoid NSAIDs'
    }
    return {
        'plan_id': plan_id,
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'follow_up_date': follow_up_date,
        'follow_up_type': follow_up_type,
        'follow_up_timing': f'Every {timeframe_days} days',
        'required_tests': diagnosis_tests.get(diagnosis, ['BP measurement']),
        'medication_reminders': [diagnosis_meds.get(diagnosis, 'Take prescribed medications as directed')] if include_meds else [],
        'med_reminder': diagnosis_meds.get(diagnosis, 'Take prescribed medications as directed'),
        'red_flag_instructions': 'Return immediately if chest pain, severe headache, or BP >180/120'
    }
